name: ModuleManager
summary: The ModuleManager class handles the product model module configuration information: the information that defines what configuration the customer is currently running.

constructors.name: ModuleManager
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the ModuleManager class

properties.name: AnalysisAndDesign
properties.summary: Indicates whether the Analysis and Design management is enabled.

properties.name: CIPModeling
properties.summary: Indicates whether the CIP modeling is enabled.

properties.name: ConcreteDetailing
properties.summary: Indicates whether the concrete detailing is enabled.

properties.name: Configuration
properties.summary: The currently running configuration of Tekla Structures.

properties.name: LoadModeling
properties.summary: Indicates whether the load modeling is enabled.

properties.name: MultimaterialModeling
properties.summary: Indicates whether the multimaterial modeling is enabled.

properties.name: RebarModeling
properties.summary: Indicates whether the rebar modeling is enabled.

properties.name: SteelDetailing
properties.summary: Indicates whether the steel detailing is enabled.

properties.name: TaskManagement
properties.summary: Indicates whether the task management is enabled.
